sentences.arabic: المَدِينَةُ القَدِيمَةُ لَهَا أَزِقَّةٌ ضَيِّقَةٌ وَجَمِيلَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Stari grad ima uske i lijepe uličice.
sentences.translationEn: The old city has narrow and beautiful alleys.

sentences.translation: Stare kuće su izgrađene od kamena.
sentences.translationEn: The old houses are built from stone.
Tourists walk through the old neighborhoods.

sentences.arabic: كُلُّ مَدِينَةٍ لَهَا تَارِيخٌ وَثَقَافَةٌ خَاصَّةٌ.
sentences.translation: Svaki grad ima svoju posebnu historiju i kulturu.
sentences.translationEn: Every city has its own special history and culture.
